_comment: v10 Phase D.1 search aliases (spec-v10 §6.1). One row per alias mapping a free-text term to a tile id. The shard is lazy-loaded on the first keystroke into the home-view search bar (bindSearch / ensureAliases in app.js); on exact-term match the user is routed to the target tile via the same path as a tool-name suggestion. Per spec-v10 §13.3 the data file is bounded at 5 KB gzipped. Industry vocabulary, misspellings, abbreviations, and adjacent-question redirects only. The resolveQuery / matchAliasPrefix helpers in search-discovery.js are the canonical pure-functional resolvers (exercised by test/unit/search-discovery.test.js); app.js currently inlines the equivalent exact-term lookup for the simple case.
_schema: Each alias row: { term: string, target: tile-id, kind: 'industry' | 'redirect' | 'adjacent' }. Multiple aliases may map to the same target.
